data.title: Write failing tests for ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs (cross-file caller update, tsconfig variants)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-add-parameter.sh — bash test script that invokes node to test ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs functionality. Tests use real ts-morph fixture TypeScript projects. These tests may be skipped if ts-morph is not installed (graceful degradation for CI without Node.js setup).

### Fixtures to create:
- tests/fixtures/ts-morph-single/: Simple TS project with tsconfig.json, one function, 3 caller files
- tests/fixtures/ts-morph-composite/: Composite TS project with tsconfig references

### Tests:
1. **test_single_project_add_parameter**: Run ts-morph-add-parameter.mjs on ts-morph-single fixture adding a parameter. Verify all 3 caller files updated.
2. **test_function_signature_updated**: After add-parameter, target function has new parameter in signature.
3. **test_cross_file_callers_updated**: All callers across different files receive updated call signature.
4. **test_composite_project_references**: ts-morph-composite project callers are found via tsconfig.json project references.
5. **test_outputs_json_to_stdout**: Script outputs JSON {files_changed, transforms_applied, errors, exit_code} to stdout.
6. **test_idempotency_ts**: Run twice on same input fixture. Second run produces identical output (no double-application of parameter).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-add-parameter.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-add-parameter.sh
- [ ] Test fixtures created at tests/fixtures/ts-morph-single/ and tests/fixtures/ts-morph-composite/
  Verify: test -d tests/fixtures/ts-morph-single && test -d tests/fixtures/ts-morph-composite
- [ ] Tests skip gracefully if ts-morph not installed (not installed = test skipped, not failed)
  Verify: grep -q 'skip\|SKIP\|not installed\|command -v node' tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-add-parameter.sh
- [ ] Valid bash syntax
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-add-parameter.sh
